insurer_name: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited

inpatient_hospitalization.limit_text: Room Rent charges up to Single Private AC room

day_care_treatments.limit_text: List of day care treatments/procedures available at https://www.icicilombard.com/health-insurance/ListOfDayCareSurgeries.pdf

domiciliary_treatment.limit_text: Requires at least 3 consecutive days of treatment
domiciliary_treatment.notes: Excludes certain conditions like asthma, bronchitis, tonsillitis, etc.

ayush_coverage.limit_text: Hospitalization for AYUSH Treatment at a Government Recognized AYUSH Hospital or AYUSH Day Care Centre

newborn_coverage.limit_text: Newborn Baby means baby born during the Policy Period and is aged up to 90 days

organ_donor_expenses.limit_text: Medical expenses incurred in respect of an organ donor’s Hospitalization during the Policy Period for harvesting of the organ donated to the Insured Person
organ_donor_expenses.notes: Excludes pre-hospitalization and post-hospitalization medical expenses of the organ donor

ambulance_cover.limit_text: Expenses incurred on road ambulance services to transfer the Insured Person to the nearest Hospital from the place of Accident/Illness
ambulance_cover.notes: Excludes transportation from Hospital to the Insured Person’s residence after discharge

restoration_benefit.limit_text: Reset up to 100% of the Annual Sum Insured, for any illness/disease/injury for the Insured Person in a Policy Year
restoration_benefit.notes: Not available for Policies with Unlimited Sum Insured option
